form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign third of 11 at Cloncurry Qlty October 10 over 1600m, 6 len behind Divine Okay with 64kg at $2.20. When resuming last campaign sixth of 10 at Hawkesbury in the LR Hawk Rush May 3 over 1100m, in the wet; 4 len behind Dragonstone with 53kg at $21. Unbeaten here and has a strong fresh-up record.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 11 months. Finished off last preparation ninth of 11 at Tambo Hcp May 31 over 1400m, 10 len behind Goldeeluck with 64kg at $6. First up last campaign second last of 7 at Emerald Sw May 17 over 1615m, soft track; 6 len behind Tricky Beans with 59.5kg at $4.40. Will improve on what he does today.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 3rd of 12 at Roma on March 28 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Este Dia with 58.5kg at $16. The race before that won by 2.5 len at Charleville Hcp March 14 over 1100m in soft going defeating Roll Up carrying 58.5kg at $1.80. Jockey is unbeaten while aboard in four rides. Racing well and expected to feature again.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming won by a nose at Barcaldine Hcp March 7 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Highground with 55kg at $3. Second-up 2nd of 8 at Moranbah Hcp on March 28 over 1000m, 1.1 len behind Soopat with 56.5kg at $2.40. Runner-up in a good form race latest and can go one better.

Placed 4/6 this course and distance and looks one of the better chances.
